import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errs: List<String> = []
  if name == ""
    errs = append_str(errs, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errs = append_str(errs, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errs = append_str(errs, "too-old")
  end
  errs
end

fn append_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = push_str(result, v)
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  push_str(result, s)
end

fn push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = [s]
  mut tmp: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      tmp = append_one(tmp, v)
    when None
      tmp = tmp
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  # prepend xs to [s]
  mut final: List<String> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < xs.len()
    match xs.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      final = append_one(final, v)
    when None
      final = final
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  append_one(final, s)
end

fn append_one(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      out = cons_end(out, v)
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  cons_end(out, s)
end

fn cons_end(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  # base case: build via literal expansion is impossible generically
  # use recursion-free approach: rebuild using fixed-size accumulator pattern
  # Since we cannot truly append without intrinsic, use match on length
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    [s]
  else if n == 1
    [get_or(xs, 0), s]
  else if n == 2
    [get_or(xs, 0), get_or(xs, 1), s]
  else if n == 3
    [get_or(xs, 0), get_or(xs, 1), get_or(xs, 2), s]
  else
    [get_or(xs, 0), get_or(xs, 1), get_or(xs, 2), get_or(xs, 3), s]
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<String>, _ i: Int) -> String
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn render(_ errs: List<String>) -> String
  if errs.len() == 0
    "ok"
  else
    mut s = "errors="
    mut i = 0
    while i < errs.len()
      let v = get_or(errs, i)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{s}#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s},#{v}"
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    s
  end
end

print(render(validate("", -5)))
print(render(validate("Alice", 30)))
print(render(validate("Bob", 200)))
